name: Wide Open Concrete Pumping
tagline: Family-run concrete pumping serving Santa Rosa and the Bay Area
seoDescription: Wide Open Concrete Pumping — family-owned line pumping in Santa Rosa, placing concrete for residential & commercial jobs across the North Bay and beyond.

sections.heading: Concrete placed clean, fast, and exactly where you need it
sections.subheading: Owner-operated line pumping for residential and commercial pours across Sonoma, Napa, Marin and the greater Bay Area.

sections.heading: About Wide Open Concrete Pumping
body: Wide Open Concrete Pumping is the next chapter of a Santa Rosa family business. Owner Steve Medeiros was born and raised in Santa Rosa and grew up around concrete pumps and heavy equipment, leaving school at noon during high school to work for his father at Medeiros Concrete Pumping. Over those years he learned the trade from every angle — running and repairing the pumps in the shop, and handling billing and dispatch in the office.

After his father passed away unexpectedly, Steve took over what remained of the family operation, started fresh with new equipment and crew, and relaunched it as Wide Open Concrete Pumping. He runs the company on the same values his father was known for — generosity, integrity, and compassion toward clients, employees, and family — placing concrete cleanly and efficiently for residential and commercial projects throughout the Bay Area.
highlights: Family-owned and operated, carrying on a Santa Rosa concrete-pumping legacy started decades ago by the Medeiros family
Residential and commercial concrete pumping and placing

items.title: Residential Concrete Pumping
items.description: Foundations, driveways, patios, walkways, and back-yard pours — placing the mud evenly so your finishers can get straight to work.

items.title: Commercial Concrete Pumping
items.description: Pumping and placing concrete for commercial projects of all sizes across the Bay Area.

items.title: Dry Mix & Specialty Pumping
items.description: Equipped to pump dry mixes, sand slurry, and 1" rock mixes for a range of placement jobs.

items.title: Well Casing Pours
items.description: Pumping concrete for well casings and similar specialty pours.

items.title: Hose Placement
items.description: Our operators run 2"–4" hose and place concrete directly on every job unless you'd rather your own crew handle the hose.

items.title: Bay Area Service Area
items.description: Mobile concrete pumping across Sonoma, Napa, Marin, Solano, San Mateo, Santa Clara, Alameda, Contra Costa, and San Francisco counties.

items.quote: Steve and his employees did an outstanding job. He did what he said he would and kept everything clean when the job was complete.
items.author: Residential customer

items.quote: Steve with Wide Open Concrete knows concrete pumping, and makes the job look easy. He worked well at placing the mud evenly, which made it easy to finish.
items.author: Verified review

items.quote: Family owned and hard working young men — our go-to for concrete work.
items.author: Repeat client

sections.heading: Work with Wide Open Concrete Pumping
sections.body: Find us at 297 Anteeo Way. Call (707) 974-9463 — we’re glad to help.
